Describe the sequence of visual elements from the intro to the shaving action.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a title card reading 'Shaving' appears; at 2s, a lower face with a dark beard meets a black electric shaver; at 12s, white foam covers the rotary heads of a Philips shaver; at 16s, the shaver moves across the chin area.

question: Describe the changes in stickers and text visible on the electric shaver throughout the clips.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a sticker with a crossed-out trash bin is visible on the shaver neck; at 12s, a skull and crossbones graphic appears near upside down Philips text; at 14s, a white sticker with a black graphic is seen; at 16s, the crossed-out wheelie bin symbol returns on the device.
